description: Summarise wrapped content via Chrome's Summarizer API, with optional inline endpoint fallback and external deep-link fallback. Conforms to admin/specs/ai-page-tools-v1.md.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Summarizer type — passed through to Summarizer.create().

attributes.name: shared-context
attributes.description: Optional shared context passed to Summarizer.create().

attributes.name: endpoint
attributes.description: Inline-fallback HTTP URL (POST JSON, streamed text/plain or one-shot application/json). Wire format: admin/specs/ai-page-tools-v1.md §C.

attributes.name: fallback-label
attributes.description: Override the trigger label when in deep-link mode.

attributes.name: fallback-prompt
attributes.description: Override the {prompt} string substituted into fallback-url.

events.name: ai-summary:state
events.description: Fires on every data-state transition. Provider is one of 'local'|'endpoint'|'deep-link'|'unavailable'.

events.name: ai-summary:result
events.description: Fires once with the full summary on stream completion.

events.name: ai-summary:error
events.description: Fires on any failure path (network, AI API, parsing).
